response.overview: Datin Hasnah is a mother who devotes all her love to five children who are each leading their own lives. However, her efforts are not received as she had hoped. Each child has their own problems, causing the relationships between them to be strained. Datin Hasnah deeply misses her children and hopes for them to reunite. Will a mother's determination to bring happiness to her family succeed, and will this family unite once again under the embrace of a mother's love?
response.title: Selendang Putih
